targets.rawSql: SELECT id, generation_status, generation_stage, generation_telemetry->>'duration_ms' AS generation_duration_ms, models->>'letter' AS model, created_at, generated_at FROM tailorings WHERE id = '$tailoring_id'::uuid
SELECT created_at, event_type, payload->>'phase' AS phase, payload FROM tailoring_debug_logs WHERE tailoring_id = '$tailoring_id'::uuid ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(
    CASE model
      WHEN 'gpt-5.4-mini' THEN
        (COALESCE(input_tokens,0) - COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)) * 0.75  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)                                     * 0.08  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(output_tokens,0)                                     * 4.50  / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'gpt-5.4' THEN
        (COALESCE(input_tokens,0) - COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)) * 2.50  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)                                     * 0.25  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(output_tokens,0)                                     * 15.00 / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'text-embedding-3-small' THEN
        COALESCE(input_tokens,0)                                        * 0.025 / 1000000.0
      ELSE 0
    END
  ), 6) AS value
FROM llm_call_logs WHERE tailoring_id = '$tailoring_id'::uuid
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM llm_call_logs WHERE tailoring_id = '$tailoring_id'::uuid
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(cached_tokens) / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens), 0), 1) AS value FROM llm_call_logs WHERE tailoring_id = '$tailoring_id'::uuid AND call_type = 'llm'
SELECT ROUND(AVG(latency_ms))::int AS value FROM llm_call_logs WHERE tailoring_id = '$tailoring_id'::uuid

SELECT
  prompt_name,
  model,
  call_type,
  COUNT(*)                    AS calls,
  SUM(input_tokens)           AS input_tokens,
  SUM(cached_tokens)          AS cached_tokens,
  SUM(output_tokens)          AS output_tokens,
  ROUND(AVG(latency_ms))::int AS avg_latency_ms,
  ROUND(SUM(
    CASE model
      WHEN 'gpt-5.4-mini' THEN
        (COALESCE(input_tokens,0) - COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)) * 0.75  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)                                     * 0.08  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(output_tokens,0)                                     * 4.50  / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'gpt-5.4' THEN
        (COALESCE(input_tokens,0) - COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)) * 2.50  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(cached_tokens,0)                                     * 0.25  / 1000000.0
        + COALESCE(output_tokens,0)                                     * 15.00 / 1000000.0
      WHEN 'text-embedding-3-small' THEN
        COALESCE(input_tokens,0)                                        * 0.025 / 1000000.0
      ELSE 0
    END
  ), 8) AS cost_usd
FROM llm_call_logs
WHERE tailoring_id = '$tailoring_id'::uuid
GROUP BY prompt_name, model, call_type
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
